mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 6.0 percent, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate revenue growth, depressing equity valuations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and housing starts indicates a synchronized demand-supply mismatch that triggers recessionary earnings revisions, driving negative equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint decline of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in more than 60% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, rising real consumer credit balances reflect resilient household spending that sustains corporate profit margins, supporting positive equity returns.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth fails to correlate with positive 5-day forward returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds 215, or the signal hit rate drops below 50% in that regime.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained upward trajectory in the industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and operational efficiency, which directly supports corporate earnings growth and equity valuations.
failure_condition: INDPRO momentum fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of observations over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls exceed 137500 thousand persons, it signals robust labor demand that fuels wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the near term.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are not significantly positive when PAYEMS exceeds 137500, or the signal hit rate falls below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising federal funds rates and increasing unemployment indicates a policy-induced economic slowdown that compresses equity multiples and triggers negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint increase in FEDFUNDS and UNRATE fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in real consumer credit balances below 380000 million dollars signals tightening household liquidity and reduced consumption expenditure, which directly pressures corporate revenues and equity valuations.
failure_condition: RSAFS falling below 380000 fails to produce negative 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of observed instances.
